description: Basic docker dashboard for InfluxDB 2.x and telegraf collector.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "n_cpus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "memory_total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "n_containers_running")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "n_containers_paused")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "n_containers_stopped")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "n_images")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "usage_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /${container:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /${container:regex}/)
  |> truncateTimeColumn(unit: 10s)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_blkio")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "io_service_bytes_recursive_read")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /${container:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * -1 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> truncateTimeColumn(unit: 10s)
  |> derivative(unit: 10s)
  |> yield(name: "derivative")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_blkio")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "io_service_bytes_recursive_write")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /${container:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine_host"] == "${engine_host}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> truncateTimeColumn(unit: 10s)
  |> derivative(unit: 10s)
  |> yield(name: "derivative")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "tx_bytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /${container:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * -1 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> truncateTimeColumn(unit: 10s)
  |> derivative(unit: 10s)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "docker_container_net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rx_bytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["container_name"] =~ /${container:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine_host"] == "${engine_host}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> truncateTimeColumn(unit: 10s)
  |> derivative(unit: 10s)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "docker",
  tag: "engine_host",
  start: v.timeRangeStart
)
list.label: host
list.name: engine_host

query.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "docker",
  tag: "engine_host",
  start: v.timeRangeStart
)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
	bucket: "${bucket}",
	tag: "com.docker.compose.project",
  predicate: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/,
  start: v.timeRangeStart
)
list.label: stack
list.name: project_stack

query.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
	bucket: "${bucket}",
	tag: "com.docker.compose.project",
  predicate: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/,
  start: v.timeRangeStart
)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
	bucket: "${bucket}",
	tag: "container_name",
  predicate: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/ and r["com.docker.compose.project"] =~ ${IncludeNonStack},
  start: v.timeRangeStart
	)
list.name: container

query.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
	bucket: "${bucket}",
	tag: "container_name",
  predicate: (r) => r["engine_host"] =~ /${engine_host:regex}/ and r["com.docker.compose.project"] =~ ${IncludeNonStack},
  start: v.timeRangeStart
	)

title: Docker v2
